summary: School Detail Page Visual Refinement Testing Complete. All 16 visual requirements verified for 3-level card hierarchy with softer coral accent #C75B2A. Tested marshall.edu (on board, match 79) and alfred.edu (on board, match 46).

All 15 metric types preserved - VERIFIED
Opportunity & Risk items in subtle rounded rows (bg-gray-50/60 rounded-xl) - VERIFIED

NO green UI (#1a8a80) found - VERIFIED
NO brown tones (#8B3F1F) found - VERIFIED

context_for_next_testing_agent: School Detail Page visual refinement complete with 3-level card hierarchy. Level 1 Hero (shadow, more padding), Level 2 Insight cards (Why This School with tinted bg, Next Step), Level 3 Data cards (Snapshot grid with primary/secondary differentiation, Program Details in gray). Accent color #C75B2A used throughout. All 15 metrics preserved. No green or brown colors.
